name: The Isle
author: ops@refx.example
description: Brutal dinosaur survival (Evrima build). SteamCMD-installed native Linux dedicated server.

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
# ReFx steamcmd shim — bootstrap steamcmd onto PATH.
if ! command -v steamcmd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
  curl -sSL https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz | tar zxf - -C /mnt/server/steamcmd || { echo "ERROR: failed to fetch steamcmd"; exit 1; }
  chmod +x /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamcmd 2>/dev/null || true
  printf '#!/bin/sh\nexec /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
  chmod +x /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
fi
set -euo pipefail
# --- ReFx SteamCMD update safety (injected) --------------------------------
# Guards every Steam update: a stuck/partial SteamCMD run (state 0x6, "Missing
# file permissions", ENOSPC, transient failure) must NOT be reported as success
# — that strands the server on a stale build ("wrong build" on join). We key off
# the app's manifest StateFlags: exactly "4" == fully installed & current.
REFX_APPID="412680"
refx_steam_manifest() { echo "/mnt/server/steamapps/appmanifest_${1}.acf"; }
refx_steam_installed() { local m; m="$(refx_steam_manifest "$1")"; [ -f "$m" ] && grep -Eq '"StateFlags"[[:space:]]+"4"' "$m"; }
refx_steam_heal() { # drop a stale/partial manifest so this update re-acquires cleanly
  local m; m="$(refx_steam_manifest "$1")"
  if [ -f "$m" ] && ! refx_steam_installed "$1"; then
    echo "[refx] steam app $1: a previous install left a stale manifest (not fully-installed) — clearing so this update re-acquires the build cleanly."
    rm -f "$m" 2>/dev/null || true
  fi
  rm -rf "/mnt/server/steamapps/downloading/$1" "/mnt/server/steamapps/temp/$1" 2>/dev/null || true
}
refx_steam_verify() { # HARD-FAIL if the app is not fully installed after the update
  if refx_steam_installed "$1"; then
    echo "[refx] steam app $1 is on the current build (SteamCMD confirmed fully installed)."
    return 0
  fi
  echo "[refx] ERROR: SteamCMD did not finish updating app $1 — the game files were NOT"
  echo "[refx] changed, so the server is still on its previous build and clients may see a"
  echo "[refx] 'wrong build' / version-mismatch error on join."
  echo "[refx][diag] install uid:gid = $(id -u 2>/dev/null):$(id -g 2>/dev/null)"
  df -h /mnt/server 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^/[refx][disk] /' || true
  ls -ln /mnt/server 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^/[refx][diag] /' | head -20 || true
  # Clear the stale manifest so the NEXT update self-heals (clean re-acquire).
  rm -f "$(refx_steam_manifest "$1")" 2>/dev/null || true
  echo "[refx] Cleared the stale manifest — run Update again and it will re-download the"
  echo "[refx] current build. Your world/config under the data dir are untouched."
  exit 1
}
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
refx_steam_heal "$REFX_APPID"

export HOME=/mnt/server
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps
cd /mnt/server
# Evrima lives ONLY on the -beta evrima branch (default branch is abandoned Legacy).
steamcmd +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login anonymous +app_update 412680 -beta evrima validate +quit
# steamclient.so (EOS/Steam registration)
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32 /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -f /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so 2>/dev/null || true
cp -f /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so 2>/dev/null || true
mkdir -p /mnt/server/TheIsle/Saved/Config/LinuxServer
cat > /mnt/server/TheIsle/Saved/Config/LinuxServer/Game.ini << ENDOFFILE
[/Script/TheIsle.TIGameSession]
ServerName=${SERVER_NAME}
MaxPlayerCount=${MAX_PLAYERS}
MapName=Gateway
bRconEnabled=false
RconPort=8888
RconPassword=
bServerPassword=${SERVER_PASSWORD_ENABLED}
ServerPassword=${SERVER_PASSWORD}
bServerDynamicWeather=true
bAllowReplay=true
bEnableHumans=false
bQueueEnabled=true
QueuePort=${QUEUE_PORT}
-
[/Script/TheIsle.TIGameStateBase]
AdminsSteamIDs=${ADMIN_STEAMID}
ENDOFFILE
cat > /mnt/server/TheIsle/Saved/Config/LinuxServer/Engine.ini << ENDOFFILE
[Core.System]
Paths=../../../Engine/Content
Paths=%GAMEDIR%Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Runtime/SoundUtilities/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Runtime/Synthesis/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Runtime/AudioSynesthesia/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Runtime/WebBrowserWidget/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/FX/Niagara/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Experimental/PythonScriptPlugin/Content
Paths=../../../TheIsle/Plugins/SteamCore/Content
Paths=../../../TheIsle/Plugins/RVTObjectLandscapeBlending/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Runtime/Nvidia/DLSS/Content
Paths=../../../TheIsle/Plugins/DonMeshPainting/Content
Paths=../../../TheIsle/Plugins/UIPF/Content
Paths=../../../TheIsle/Plugins/EOSCore/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Experimental/ControlRig/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Runtime/Nvidia/DLSSMoviePipelineSupport/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/MovieScene/MovieRenderPipeline/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Compositing/OpenColorIO/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/MovieScene/SequencerScripting/Content
Paths=../../../TheIsle/Plugins/ImpostorBaker/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/2D/Paper2D/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Developer/AnimationSharing/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Editor/GeometryMode/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Editor/SpeedTreeImporter/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Enterprise/DatasmithContent/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Experimental/ChaosClothEditor/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Experimental/GeometryProcessing/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Experimental/GeometryCollectionPlugin/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Experimental/ChaosSolverPlugin/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Experimental/ChaosNiagara/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Experimental/MotoSynth/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Media/MediaCompositing/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Runtime/OpenXREyeTracker/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Runtime/OpenXR/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/Runtime/OpenXRHandTracking/Content
Paths=../../../Engine/Plugins/VirtualProduction/Takes/Content

[EpicOnlineServices]
DedicatedServerClientId=xyza7891gk5PRo3J7G9puCJGFJjmEguW
DedicatedServerClientSecret=pKWl6t5i9NJK8gTpVlAxzENZ65P8hYzodV8Dqe5Rlc8
ENDOFFILE
chmod -R 777 /mnt/server/TheIsle/Saved/Config/LinuxServer
refx_steam_verify "$REFX_APPID"
echo 'The Isle install complete.'
